```{r}
                  "ICC", "harm.", "ICC", "harm."),
    booktabs  = TRUE,
    linesep   = "",
    align     = c("l", rep("c", 16))
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  add_header_above(c(
    " "              = 1,
    "SKYRA cat"      = 2,
    "VERIO cat"      = 2,
    "SKYRA recon6"   = 2,
    "VERIO recon6"   = 2,
    "SKYRA recon7"   = 2,
    "VERIO recon7"   = 2,
    "SKYRA samseg"   = 2,
    "VERIO samseg"   = 2
  )) |>
  column_spec(1, border_right = TRUE) |>
  column_spec(c(3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15), border_right = TRUE) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; harm. = harmonized ICC; ",
      "TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; ",
      "LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; ",
      "AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-iced-variances
#| tbl-cap: "ICED variances before and after harmonization in cross-sectional data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
iced[, c("ROI", paste0(rep(c("truevar", "SKYRAvar", "VERIOvar", "catvar", "recon6var", "recon7var", "samsegvar", "obsvar"),
                            each = 2), c("", "_adj")))] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c("ROI",
                  "var", "harm.", "var", "harm.",
                  "var", "harm.", "var", "harm.",
                  "var", "harm.", "var", "harm.",
                  "var", "harm.", "var", "harm."),
    booktabs  = TRUE,
    linesep   = "",
    align     = c("l", rep("c", 16))
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  add_header_above(c(
    " "        = 1,
    "true"  = 2,
    "SKYRA"    = 2,
    "VERIO"    = 2,
    "cat"      = 2,
    "recon6"   = 2,
    "recon7"   = 2,
    "samseg"   = 2,
    "residual"   = 2
  )) |>
  column_spec(1, border_right = TRUE) |>
  column_spec(c(3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15), border_right = TRUE) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; var = latent variable variance; harm. = harmonized latent variable variance; ",
      "TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; ",
      "LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; ",
      "AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-iced-means
#| tbl-cap: "ICED means before and after harmonization in cross-sectional data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
iced[, c("ROI", paste0(rep(c("truemean", "VERIOmean", "catmean", "recon6mean", "recon7mean"),
                            each = 2), c("", "_adj")))] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c("ROI",
                  "mean", "harm.", "mean", "harm.",
                  "mean", "harm.", "mean", "harm.",
                  "mean", "harm."),
    booktabs  = TRUE,
    linesep   = "",
    align     = c("l", rep("c", 10))
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  add_header_above(c(
    " "        = 1,
    "true"  = 2,
    "VERIO"    = 2,
    "cat"      = 2,
    "recon6"   = 2,
    "recon7"   = 2
  )) |>
  column_spec(1, border_right = TRUE) |>
  column_spec(c(3, 5, 7, 9), border_right = TRUE) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "true = true score with SKYRA and samseg as reference scanner and segmentation, respectively; ",
      "ROI = region of interest; mean = latent variable mean; harm. = harmonized latent variable mean; ",
      "TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; ",
      "LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; ",
      "AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```
:::

```{r update_prep_no_correction}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_mat <- outcomes$update_pd_matrices
pd_sub2 <- data.frame(matrix(nrow = 7, ncol = 5))
colnames(pd_sub2) <- c("ROI", "pre", "post", "mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_post")
pd_sub2$ROI <- c("TIV", "TGMV", "TWMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV")
for (outcome in c("TIV", "TGMV", "TWMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV")){
  pre <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_no_correction")]]
  post <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_no_correction_adj")]]
  n_comparisons <- sum(1:(ncol(pre)-1))
  n_exceeding_pre <- length(which(pre >2)) # enumerate the comparisons with a PD > 2%
  n_exceeding_post <- length(which(post >2)) # enumerate the comparisons with a PD > 2%
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == outcome, "pre"] <- paste0(n_exceeding_pre, "/", n_comparisons)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == outcome, "post"] <- paste0(n_exceeding_post, "/", n_comparisons)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_pre"] <- mean(abs(pre), na.rm = T)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_post"] <- mean(abs(post), na.rm = T)
}
pd_sub2$mean_pd_pre <- round(pd_sub2$mean_pd_pre, digits = 2)
pd_sub2$mean_pd_post <- round(pd_sub2$mean_pd_post, digits = 3)
anovas <- outcomes$update_anova_res
pwcs <- outcomes$update_pwcs
for (outcome in c("TIV", "TGMV", "TWMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV")){
  pre <- pwcs[[paste0(outcome, "_pwc_no_correction")]]
  post <- pwcs[[paste0(outcome, "_pwc_no_correction_adj")]]
  n_pwcs <- nrow(pre)
  n_sig_pre <- length(which(pre$p.adj.signif != "ns"))
  n_sig_post <- length(which(post$p.adj.signif != "ns"))
  anovas[anovas$ROI == outcome, "n_sig_pre"] <- paste0(n_sig_pre, "/", n_pwcs)
  anovas[anovas$ROI == outcome, "n_sig_post"] <- paste0(n_sig_post, "/", n_pwcs)
}
anovas$p_no_correction <- ifelse(anovas$p_no_correction < 0.001, formatC(anovas$p_no_correction, format = "e", digits = 2), anovas$p_no_correction)
anovas$p_no_correction_adj <- ifelse(anovas$p_no_correction_adj < 0.001, formatC(anovas$p_no_correction_adj, format = "e", digits = 2), anovas$p_no_correction_adj)
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-update-icc-no-correction
#| tbl-cap: "ICCs before and after harmonization without manually edited scans - cross-sectional dataset"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
df2 <- update_lme_icc_res_no_wmhv %>%
  mutate(
    ICC_CI = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", ICC_no_correction, ICC_lower_95_CI_no_correction, ICC_upper_95_CI_no_correction),
    ICC_adj_CI = sprintf("%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)", ICC_no_correction_adj, ICC_lower_95_CI_no_correction_adj, ICC_upper_95_CI_no_correction_adj))

df2[, c("ROI", "ICC_CI", "ICC_adj_CI")] |>
  kbl(
    col.names = c(
      "ROI",
      "ICC (95% CI)",
      "ICC (95% CI) harm."
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    align    = "lccc"
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  column_spec(1, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(2:4, width = "4cm") |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; ",
      "CI = confidence interval; harm. = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "TIV = total intracranial volume; ",
      "TGMV = total grey matter volume; TWMV = total white matter volume; ",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-update-pd-no-correction
#| tbl-cap: "Percent differences before and after harmonization without manually edited scans - cross-sectional dataset"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_sub2 |>
  kbl(
    col.names = c(
      "ROI",
      "PD > 2%",
      "PD > 2% harm.",
      "mean PD",
      "mean PD harm."
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    align    = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r") 
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; PD = percentage difference; harm. = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "TIV = total intracranial volume; TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; ",
      "LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; ",
      "AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: tbl-update-signif-no-correction
#| tbl-cap: "Statistical significance of differences before and after harmonization without manually edited scans - cross-sectional dataset"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
anovas[, c("ROI", "p_no_correction", "ges_no_correction", "n_sig_pre", "p_no_correction_adj", "ges_no_correction_adj", "n_sig_post")] |>
  kbl(
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
      "ROI",
      "p-value",
      "$\\eta^2$",
      "sig. PWCs",
      "p-value",
      "$\\eta^2$",
      "sig. PWCs"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    align    = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r", "r", "r")
  ) |>
    add_header_above(c(
    " " = 1,
    "unadjusted" = 3,
    "harmonized" = 3
  )) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
  general = paste0(
    "ROI = region of interest; p-value = p-value from ANOVA; ",
    "$\\\\eta^2$", " = generalized ", "$\\\\eta^2$", " from ANOVA;",
    "harm. = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
    "sig. PWCs = share of significant pairwise comparisons; ",
    "TIV = total intracranial volume; TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
    "TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; ",
    "LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
    "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; ",
    "AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
  ),
  general_title  = "",
  threeparttable = TRUE,
  escape = FALSE
  )
```

```{r life_prep_no_correction}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_mat <- outcomes$life_pd_matrices
pd_sub2 <- data.frame(matrix(nrow = 5, ncol = 7))
colnames(pd_sub2) <- c("ROI", "pre", "nh", "combat", "mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")
pd_sub2$ROI <- c("\u0394TGMV", "\u0394TCV", "\u0394LVV",  "\u0394HCV", "\u0394AV")
for (outcome in c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV")){
  pre <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_no_correction")]]
  nh <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_nh_no_correction")]]
  combat <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_combat_no_correction")]]
  n_comparisons <- sum(1:(ncol(pre)-1))
  n_exceeding_pre <- length(which(pre >2)) # enumerate the comparisons with a PD > 2%
  n_exceeding_nh <- length(which(nh >2)) # enumerate the comparisons with a PD > 2%
  n_exceeding_combat <- length(which(combat >2)) # enumerate the comparisons with a PD > 2%
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == paste0("\u0394", outcome), "pre"] <- paste0(n_exceeding_pre, "/", n_comparisons)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == paste0("\u0394", outcome), "nh"] <- paste0(n_exceeding_nh, "/", n_comparisons)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == paste0("\u0394", outcome), "combat"] <- paste0(n_exceeding_combat, "/", n_comparisons)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == paste0("\u0394", outcome), "mean_pd_pre"] <- mean(abs(pre), na.rm = T)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == paste0("\u0394", outcome), "mean_pd_nh"] <- mean(abs(nh), na.rm = T)
  pd_sub2[pd_sub2$ROI == paste0("\u0394", outcome), "mean_pd_combat"] <- mean(abs(combat), na.rm = T)
}
pwcs <- outcomes$life_pwcs
pwc <- pwcs$pwc_no_correction[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_no_correction))]
pwc_combat <- pwcs$pwc_combat_no_correction[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_combat_no_correction))]
colnames(pwc_combat) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_combat), "_combat")
pwc_nh <- pwcs$pwc_nh[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_nh_no_correction))]
colnames(pwc_nh) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_nh), "_nh")
pwc_all <- cbind(pwc, pwc_combat, pwc_nh)
pwc_all$p <- ifelse(pwc_all$p < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all$p, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all$p)
pwc_all$p_nh <- ifelse(pwc_all$p_nh < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all$p_nh, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all$p_nh)
pwc_all$p_combat <- ifelse(pwc_all$p_combat < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all$p_combat, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all$p_combat)
pwc_all$measure <- gsub("d", "\u0394", pwc_all$measure)
# calculate cohens d
pwc_all$d <- pwc_all$statistic/(sqrt(pwc_all$n1))
pwc_all$d_combat <- pwc_all$statistic_combat/(sqrt(pwc_all$n1_combat))
pwc_all$d_nh <- pwc_all$statistic_nh/(sqrt(pwc_all$n1_nh))
pwc_all[,c("d", "d_nh", "d_combat")] <- abs(round(pwc_all[,c("d", "d_nh", "d_combat")], digits = 2))
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-icc-no-correction
#| tbl-cap: "ICCs before and after harmonization without manually edited scans - longitudinal dataset"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
life_lme_icc_res_no_wmhv <- life_lme_icc_res[!grepl("WMHV", life_lme_icc_res$ROI), ]
df2 <- life_lme_icc_res_no_wmhv %>%
  mutate(
    ICC_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_no_correction, ICC_lower_95_CI_no_correction, ICC_upper_95_CI_no_correction
    ),
    ICC_nh_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_nh_no_correction, ICC_lower_95_CI_nh_no_correction, ICC_upper_95_CI_nh_no_correction
    ),
    ICC_combat_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_combat_no_correction, ICC_lower_95_CI_combat_no_correction, ICC_upper_95_CI_combat_no_correction
    )
  ) 
df2 <- df2[df2$ROI != "WMHV",]
df2[, c("ROI", "ICC_CI", "ICC_nh_CI", "ICC_combat_CI")] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
      "ROI",
      "ICC (95% CI)",
      "ICC (95% CI) ~ neuroHarm",
      "ICC (95% CI) ~ ComBat"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    align    = c("l", "c", "c", "c"),
    format = "latex"
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; ",
      "CI = confidence interval; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "\u0394 = change in",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-pd-no-correction
#| tbl-cap: "Percent differences before and after harmonization without manually edited scans - longitudinal dataset"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_sub2[,c("ROI", "pre", "mean_pd_pre", "nh", "mean_pd_nh", "combat", "mean_pd_combat")] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
      "ROI",
      "> 2%",
      "PD",
      "> 2%",
      "PD",
      "> 2%",
      "PD"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    align    = c("l", "r", "c", "r", "c", "r", "c"),
    format = "latex"
  ) |>
    add_header_above(c(
    " " = 1,
    "unadjusted" = 2,
    "neuroHarm" = 2,
    "ComBat" = 2
  )) |>

  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; > 2% = share of percent differences > 2%; ",
      "PD = percent difference;  ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TIV = total intracranial volume; ",
      "TGMV = total grey matter volume; TWMV = total white matter volume; ",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-signif-no-correction
#| tbl-cap: "Statistical significance of differences before and after harmonization without manually edited scans - longitudinal dataset"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pwc_all[, c("measure", "p", "d", "p_nh", "d_nh", "p_combat", "d_combat")] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
    "ROI",
    "p-value",
    "$d_z$",
    "p-value",
    "$d_{z}$",
    "p-value",
    "$d_{z}$"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    format   = "latex",
    align    = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c")
  ) |>
  add_header_above(c(
    " " = 1,
    "unadjusted" = 2,
    "neuroHarm" = 2,
    "ComBat" = 2
  )) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; $d_z$ = Cohen's d for paired samples; TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; ",
      "WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE,
    escape = FALSE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-add-mult
#| tbl-cap: "Statistical significance of additive and multiplicative batch effects before and after harmonization in longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
load("/data/pt_life/ResearchProjects/LLammer/intergeneration/segmentation_harmonization/Results/longcombat_tests.RData")
longCombat_results <- data.frame(matrix(ncol = 5, nrow =6))
colnames(longCombat_results) <- c("ROI", "add_pre", "add_post", "mult_pre", "mult_post")
longCombat_results$ROI <- c(longcombat_tests$addTestTable$Feature, "WMHV")
for (roi in longCombat_results$ROI){
  if (roi != "WMHV") {
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "add_pre"] <- longcombat_tests$addTestTable[longcombat_tests$addTestTable$Feature == roi, "KR p-value"]
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "add_post"] <- longcombat_tests$addTestTable_combat[longcombat_tests$addTestTable_combat$Feature == paste0(roi, ".combat"), "KR p-value"]
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "mult_pre"] <- longcombat_tests$multTestTable[longcombat_tests$multTestTable$Feature == roi, "p-value"]
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "mult_post"] <- longcombat_tests$multTestTable_combat[longcombat_tests$multTestTable_combat$Feature == paste0(roi, ".combat"), "p-value"]
  } else {
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "add_pre"] <- longcombat_tests$addTestTable_wmhv[longcombat_tests$addTestTable_wmhv$Feature == "WMHV_norm", "KR p-value"]
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "add_post"] <- longcombat_tests$addTestTable_wmhv_combat[longcombat_tests$addTestTable_wmhv_combat$Feature == "WMHV_norm.combat", "KR p-value"]
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "mult_pre"] <- longcombat_tests$multTestTable_wmhv[longcombat_tests$multTestTable_wmhv$Feature == "WMHV_norm", "p-value"]
    longCombat_results[longCombat_results$ROI == roi, "mult_post"] <- longcombat_tests$multTestTable_wmhv_combat[longcombat_tests$multTestTable_wmhv_combat$Feature == "WMHV_norm.combat", "p-value"]
  }
}
longCombat_results$add_pre <- ifelse(as.numeric(longCombat_results$add_pre) < 0.001, formatC(as.numeric(longCombat_results$add_pre), format = "e", digits = 2), round(as.numeric(longCombat_results$add_pre), digits = 3))
longCombat_results$add_post <- ifelse(as.numeric(longCombat_results$add_post) < 0.001, formatC(as.numeric(longCombat_results$add_post), format = "e", digits = 2), round(as.numeric(longCombat_results$add_post), digits = 3))
longCombat_results$mult_pre <- ifelse(as.numeric(longCombat_results$mult_pre) < 0.001, formatC(as.numeric(longCombat_results$mult_pre), format = "e", digits = 2), round(as.numeric(longCombat_results$mult_pre), digits = 3))
longCombat_results$mult_post <- ifelse(as.numeric(longCombat_results$mult_post) < 0.001, formatC(as.numeric(longCombat_results$mult_post), format = "e", digits = 2), round(as.numeric(longCombat_results$mult_post), digits = 3))
longCombat_results %>%
  kbl(
    col.names = c("ROI", "p add.", "p add. harm.", "p mult.", "p mult. harm."),
    align = c("l", "r", "r", "r", "r"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = ""
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down")
  ) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; p add = p-value for additive effects; harm. = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; p mult. = p-value for multiplicative effects; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r life_cross_prep}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df <- outcomes$life_lme_icc_res
df$ROI <- gsub("d", "\u0394", df$ROI)
df2 <- df %>%
  mutate(
    ICC_nh_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_cross_nh, ICC_lower_95_CI_cross_nh, ICC_upper_95_CI_cross_nh
    ),
    ICC_combat_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_cross_combat, ICC_lower_95_CI_cross_combat, ICC_upper_95_CI_cross_combat
    )
  ) 
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-icc-cross
#| tbl-cap: "ICCs before and after harmonization of results of cross-sectional pipelines in longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df2[1:5, c("ROI", "ICC_nh_CI", "ICC_combat_CI")] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
      "ROI",
      "ICC (95% CI) ~ neuroHarm",
      "ICC (95% CI) ~ ComBat"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    format   = "latex",
    align    = c("l", "c", "c")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; ",
      "CI = confidence interval; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; \u0394 = change in; ",
      "TIV = total intracranial volume; ",
      "TGMV = total grey matter volume; TWMV = total white matter volume; ",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r change_life_icc_table}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df <- outcomes$change_life_lme_icc_res
colnames(df) <- paste0(colnames(df), "_change")
df2 <- cbind(df, outcomes$life_lme_icc_res[,c("ICC", "ICC_lower_95_CI", "ICC_upper_95_CI")])
df3 <- df2 %>%
  mutate(
    ICC_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC, ICC_lower_95_CI, ICC_upper_95_CI
    ),
    ICC_change_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_change, ICC_lower_95_CI_change, ICC_upper_95_CI_change
    )
  ) 
df3$ROI[nrow(df3)] <- "WMHV"
df3$ROI <- paste0("\u0394", df3$ROI)
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-icc-change
#| tbl-cap: "ICCs before and after harmonization of directly harmonized change scores in longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df3[, c("ROI", "ICC_CI", "ICC_change_CI")] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
      "ROI",
      "ICC (95% CI)",
      "ICC (95% CI) ~ neuroHarm"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    format   = "latex",
    align    = c("l", "c", "c")
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size     = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; ",
      "CI = confidence interval; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "~ ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; \u0394 = change in; ",
      "TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; ",
      "WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r tp_prep}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df <- outcomes$tp_life_lme_icc_res
df$ROI[nrow(df)] <- "WMHV"
df_bl <- df %>%
  mutate(
    ICC_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_bl, ICC_lower_95_CI_bl, ICC_upper_95_CI_bl
    ),
    ICC_nh_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_nh_bl, ICC_lower_95_CI_nh_bl, ICC_upper_95_CI_nh_bl
    ),
    ICC_combat_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_combat_bl, ICC_lower_95_CI_combat_bl, ICC_upper_95_CI_combat_bl
    )
  ) 
df_fu <- df %>%
  mutate(
    ICC_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_fu, ICC_lower_95_CI_fu, ICC_upper_95_CI_fu
    ),
    ICC_nh_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_nh_fu, ICC_lower_95_CI_nh_fu, ICC_upper_95_CI_nh_fu
    ),
    ICC_combat_CI = sprintf(
      "%.2f (%.2f, %.2f)",
      ICC_combat_fu, ICC_lower_95_CI_combat_fu, ICC_upper_95_CI_combat_fu
    )
  ) 

pd_mat <- outcomes$tp_life_pd_matrices

pd_bl <- data.frame(matrix(nrow = 6, ncol = 4))
colnames(pd_bl) <- c("ROI", "mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")
pd_bl$ROI <- c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")
for (outcome in c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")){
  pre <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_bl")]]
  nh <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_nh_bl")]]
  combat <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_combat_bl")]]
  pd_bl[pd_bl$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_pre"] <- mean(abs(pre), na.rm = T)
  pd_bl[pd_bl$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_nh"] <- mean(abs(nh), na.rm = T)
  pd_bl[pd_bl$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_combat"] <- mean(abs(combat), na.rm = T)
}
pd_bl[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")] <- round(pd_bl[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")], digits = 3)
pd_fu <- data.frame(matrix(nrow = 6, ncol = 4))
colnames(pd_fu) <- c("ROI", "mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")
pd_fu$ROI <- c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")
for (outcome in c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV",  "HCV", "AV", "WMHV")){
  pre <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_fu")]]
  nh <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_nh_fu")]]
  combat <- pd_mat[[paste0(outcome, "_mean_pd_mat_combat_fu")]]
  pd_fu[pd_fu$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_pre"] <- mean(abs(pre), na.rm = T)
  pd_fu[pd_fu$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_nh"] <- mean(abs(nh), na.rm = T)
  pd_fu[pd_fu$ROI == outcome, "mean_pd_combat"] <- mean(abs(combat), na.rm = T)
}
pd_fu[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")] <- round(pd_fu[,c("mean_pd_pre", "mean_pd_nh", "mean_pd_combat")], digits = 3)
pwcs <- outcomes$tp_life_pwcs
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_bl$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_bl$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_bl$measure <- "WMHV"
# ignore "adjusted" cols (there was no adjustment)
pwc <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_bl[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_bl))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_bl)
pwc_combat <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_combat_bl[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_combat_bl))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_bl)
colnames(pwc_combat) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_combat), "_combat")
pwc_nh <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_nh_bl[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_nh_bl))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_bl)
colnames(pwc_nh) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_nh), "_nh")
pwc_all_bl <- cbind(pwc, pwc_combat, pwc_nh)
pwc_all_bl$p <- ifelse(pwc_all_bl$p < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_bl$p, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_bl$p)
pwc_all_bl$p_nh <- ifelse(pwc_all_bl$p_nh < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_bl$p_nh, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_bl$p_nh)
pwc_all_bl$p_combat <- ifelse(pwc_all_bl$p_combat < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_bl$p_combat, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_bl$p_combat)
# calculate cohens d
pwc_all_bl$d <- pwc_all_bl$statistic/(sqrt(pwc_all_bl$n1))
pwc_all_bl$d_combat <- pwc_all_bl$statistic_combat/(sqrt(pwc_all_bl$n1_combat))
pwc_all_bl$d_nh <- pwc_all_bl$statistic_nh/(sqrt(pwc_all_bl$n1_nh))
pwc_all_bl[,c("d", "d_nh", "d_combat")] <- abs(round(pwc_all_bl[,c("d", "d_nh", "d_combat")], digits = 2))
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_fu$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_fu$measure <- "WMHV"
pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_fu$measure <- "WMHV"
# ignore "adjusted" cols (there was no adjustment)
pwc <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_fu[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_fu))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_fu)
pwc_combat <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_combat_fu[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_combat_fu))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_combat_fu)
colnames(pwc_combat) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_combat), "_combat")
pwc_nh <- rbind(pwcs$pwc_nh_fu[,!grepl("adj", colnames(pwcs$pwc_nh_fu))], pwcs$pwc_wmhv_nh_fu)
colnames(pwc_nh) <- paste0(colnames(pwc_nh), "_nh")
pwc_all_fu <- cbind(pwc, pwc_combat, pwc_nh)
pwc_all_fu$p <- ifelse(pwc_all_fu$p < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_fu$p, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_fu$p)
pwc_all_fu$p_nh <- ifelse(pwc_all_fu$p_nh < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_fu$p_nh, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_fu$p_nh)
pwc_all_fu$p_combat <- ifelse(pwc_all_fu$p_combat < 0.001, formatC(pwc_all_fu$p_combat, format = "e", digits = 2), pwc_all_fu$p_combat)
pwc_all_fu$d <- pwc_all_fu$statistic / (sqrt(pwc_all_fu$n1))
pwc_all_fu$d_combat <- pwc_all_fu$statistic_combat / (sqrt(pwc_all_fu$n1_combat))
pwc_all_fu$d_nh <- pwc_all_fu$statistic_nh / (sqrt(pwc_all_fu$n1_nh))
pwc_all_fu[, c("d", "d_nh", "d_combat")] <- abs(round(pwc_all_fu[, c("d", "d_nh", "d_combat")], 2))
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-bl-icc
#| tbl-cap: "Baseline ICCs before and after harmonization in the longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df_bl[, c("ROI", "ICC_CI", "ICC_nh_CI", "ICC_combat_CI")] %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "ICC (95% CI)", "ICC (95% CI) ~ neuroHarm", "ICC (95% CI) ~ longCB"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    align = "c"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; CI = confidence interval; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ longCB = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-fu-icc
#| tbl-cap: "Follow-up ICCs before and after harmonization in the longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df_fu[, c("ROI", "ICC_CI", "ICC_nh_CI", "ICC_combat_CI")] %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "ICC (95% CI)", "ICC (95% CI) ~ neuroHarm", "ICC (95% CI) ~ longCB"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    align = "c"
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; ICC = intraclass correlation coefficient; CI = confidence interval; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ longCB = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-bl-pd
#| tbl-cap: "Baseline percent differences before and after harmonization in the longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_bl %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "PD", "PD ~ neuroHarm", "PD ~ longCB"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = ""
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  column_spec(which(colnames(pd_sub2) %in% c("pre", "nh", "combat")), extra_css = "text-align: right;") %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; PD = percent difference; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ longCB = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TIV = total intracranial volume; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
    )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-fu-pd
#| tbl-cap: "Follow-up percent differences before and after harmonization in the longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pd_fu %>%
  kable(
    col.names = c("ROI", "PD", "PD ~ neuroHarm", "PD ~ longCB"),
    format = "latex",
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = ""
  ) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position")) %>%
  column_spec(which(colnames(pd_sub2) %in% c("pre", "nh", "combat")), extra_css = "text-align: right;") %>%
  footnote(
    general = "ROI = region of interest; PD = percent difference; ~ neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ~ longCB = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; TIV = total intracranial volume; TGMV = total grey matter volume; TWMV = total white matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume",
    general_title = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE
  )
```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-bl-signif
#| tbl-cap: "Statistical significance of differences before and after harmonization in the baseline longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pwc_all_bl[, c("measure", "p", "d", "p_nh", "d_nh", "p_combat", "d_combat")] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
    "ROI",
    "p-value",
    "$d_z$",
    "p-value",
    "$d_{z}$",
    "p-value",
    "$d_{z}$"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    format   = "latex",
    align    = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c")
  ) |>
  add_header_above(c(
    " " = 1,
    "unadjusted" = 2,
    "neuroHarm" = 2,
    "ComBat" = 2
  )) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; $d_z$ = Cohen's d for paired samples; TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; ",
      "WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE,
    escape = FALSE
  )

```

```{r }
#| label: tbl-life-fu-signif
#| tbl-cap: "Statistical significance of differences before and after harmonization in the follow-up longitudinal data"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
pwc_all_fu[, c("measure", "p", "d", "p_nh", "d_nh", "p_combat", "d_combat")] |>
  kbl(
    row.names = FALSE,
    escape = FALSE,
    col.names = c(
    "ROI",
    "p-value",
    "$d_z$",
    "p-value",
    "$d_{z}$",
    "p-value",
    "$d_{z}$"
    ),
    booktabs = TRUE,
    linesep  = "",
    format   = "latex",
    align    = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c")
  ) |>
  add_header_above(c(
    " " = 1,
    "unadjusted" = 2,
    "neuroHarm" = 2,
    "ComBat" = 2
  )) |>
  kable_styling(
    latex_options = c("hold_position", "scale_down"),
    font_size = 10
  ) |>
  footnote(
    general = paste0(
      "ROI = region of interest; neuroHarm = harmonized with neuroHarmonize; ",
      "ComBat = harmonized with longitudinal ComBat; $d_z$ = Cohen's d for paired samples; TGMV = total grey matter volume; ",
      "TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; ",
      "HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume; ",
      "WMHV = white matter hyperintensity volume"
    ),
    general_title  = "",
    threeparttable = TRUE,
    escape = FALSE
  )
```

\FloatBarrier

## Supplementary figures

```{r update_raincloud_prep}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
library(ggdist)
df <- read.csv("/data/pt_life/ResearchProjects/LLammer/intergeneration/segmentation_harmonization/scanner_update/Data/df_update.csv")
df_wmhv <- read.csv("/data/pt_life/ResearchProjects/LLammer/intergeneration/segmentation_harmonization/scanner_update/Data/wmhv_update.csv")
df$SITE <- gsub("_", " ", df$SITE)
df$SITE <- factor(df$SITE, levels = c("SKYRA recon7", "VERIO recon7", "SKYRA recon6", "VERIO recon6", "SKYRA samseg", "VERIO samseg", "SKYRA cat", "VERIO cat"))  
df_wmhv$asinh <- asinh(df_wmhv$Lesions)
# retransform LVV
df$LVV_asinh <- df$LVV
df$LVV <- sinh(df$LVV)
colors = met.brewer(name="Java", n=5, type="discrete")
colors <- colors[c(1,2,4,5)]
colors <- rep(colors, each = 2)
make_raincloud <- function(data, col, group_val, fill_color, dotsize = 1.25) {
  data_filtered <- data %>% filter(SITE == group_val)
  
  ggplot(data_filtered, aes(x = 1, y = .data[[col]])) +
    stat_halfeye(adjust = 0.5, width = 0.6, justification = -0.2,
                 .width = 0, point_colour = NA, fill = fill_color) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, outlier.shape = NA, alpha = 0.5) +
    stat_dots(side = "left", justification = 1.1, dotsize = dotsize) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(title = as.character(group_val), x = NULL, y = col) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.title.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
}
# Create one plot per column
cols <- c("TIV", "TGMV", "TWMV", "TCV", "LVV", "LVV_asinh", "HCV", "AV")
group_vals <- c("SKYRA recon7", "VERIO recon7", "SKYRA recon6", "VERIO recon6", "SKYRA samseg", "VERIO samseg", "SKYRA cat", "VERIO cat")
plots_by_col <- lapply(cols, function(col) {
  
  group_plots <- mapply(make_raincloud,
                        group_val = group_vals,
                        fill_color = colors,
                        MoreArgs = list(data = df, col = col),
                        SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
  
  wrap_plots(group_plots, ncol = 2)
})

# Name the list by column for easy access
names(plots_by_col) <- cols

# create plots for WMHV
# remove highest values to enable visualisation
df_wmhv_cut <- df_wmhv[df_wmhv$Lesions < 5000,] 
add_row_label <- function(plot_list, label) {
  plot_list[[1]] <- plot_list[[1]] + 
    labs(x = label) +
    theme(axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5))
  plot_list
}
unharmonized <- mapply(make_raincloud,
       group_val = c("SKYRA", "VERIO"),
       fill_color = colors[5:6],
       MoreArgs = list(data = df_wmhv_cut, col = "Lesions"),
       SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
asinh  <- mapply(make_raincloud,
                 group_val = c("SKYRA", "VERIO"),
                 fill_color = colors[5:6],
                 MoreArgs = list(data = df_wmhv_cut, col = "asinh"),
                 SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
norm  <- mapply(make_raincloud,
                 group_val = c("SKYRA", "VERIO"),
                 fill_color = colors[5:6],
                 MoreArgs = list(data = df_wmhv_cut, col = "WMHV_norm"),
                 SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
unharmonized <- add_row_label(unharmonized, "original")
asinh  <- add_row_label(asinh, "asinh")
norm   <- add_row_label(norm, expression("log"[10]))
wmhv_plots <- wrap_plots(unname(c(unharmonized, asinh, norm)), nrow = 3)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-tiv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of total intracranial volume by batch in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$TIV)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-tgmv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of total grey matter volume by batch in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$TGMV)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-twmv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of total white matter volume by batch in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$TWMV)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-tcv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of total cortical volume by batch in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$TCV)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-lvv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of bilateral lateral ventricle volume by batch in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$LVV)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-lvv-asinh-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of bilateral lateral ventricle volume by batch after inverse hyperbolic sine transformation in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$LVV_asinh)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-hcv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of bilateral hippocampal volume by batch in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$HCV)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-av-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of bilateral amygdala volume by batch in cross-sectional data."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col$AV)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-update-wmhv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of white matter hyperintensity volume by batch in cross-sectional data. 1st row: original data. 2nd row: after inverse hyperbolic sine transformation. 3rd row: after decadic logarithm transformation. The maximum value is not depicted."
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(wmhv_plots)
```

```{r life_raincloud_prep}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
df <- read.csv("/data/pt_life/ResearchProjects/LLammer/intergeneration/segmentation_harmonization/life/Data/df_life.csv")
df_wmhv <- read.csv("/data/pt_life/ResearchProjects/LLammer/intergeneration/segmentation_harmonization/life/Data/df_life_wmhv.csv")
# retransform LVV
df$LVV_asinh <- df$LVV
df$LVV <- sinh(df$LVV)
df_wmhv$WMHV_asinh <- asinh(df_wmhv$WMHV)
df_wmhv$WMHV_boxcox <- df_wmhv$WMHV_norm
# how many were < 20k
n_over_10k <- length(which(df_wmhv$WMHV >= 10000))
df_wmhv <- df_wmhv[df_wmhv$WMHV < 10000,]
group_vals <- c("samseg", "recon5")
cols <- c("TGMV", "TCV", "LVV", "LVV_asinh", "HCV", "AV")
plots_by_col <- lapply(cols, function(col) {
  
  group_plots <- mapply(make_raincloud,
                        group_val = group_vals,
                        fill_color = c(colors[5], colors[3]),
                        MoreArgs = list(data = df, col = col),
                        SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
  group_plots[[1]] <- group_plots[[1]] + labs(x = col)
  
  wrap_plots(group_plots, ncol = 2)
})
plots_by_col <- wrap_plots(plots_by_col, nrow = 6)

group_vals <- c("samseg", "lst")
cols <- c("WMHV", "WMHV_asinh", "WMHV_boxcox")
plots_by_col_wmhv <- lapply(cols, function(col) {
  
  group_plots <- mapply(make_raincloud,
                        group_val = group_vals,
                        fill_color = c(colors[5], colors[3]),
                        MoreArgs = list(data = df_wmhv, col = col),
                        SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
  group_plots[[1]] <- group_plots[[1]] + labs(x = col)
  
  wrap_plots(group_plots, ncol = 2)
})

wmhv_plots <- wrap_plots(plots_by_col_wmhv, nrow = 3)
wmhv_caption <- paste0("Raincloud plots of white matter hyperintensity volume by batch in longitudinal data. 1st row: original data. 2nd row: after inverse hyperbolic sine transformation. 3rd row: after decadic logarithm transformation. The highest ",  n_over_10k, " values are not depicted.")
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-life-raincloud
#| fig-cap: "Raincloud plots of measurements by batch in longitudinal data. TGMV = total grey matter volume; TCV = total cortical volume; LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume; LVV_asinh = bilateral lateral ventricle volume after inverse hyperbolic sine transformation; HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume; AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(plots_by_col)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-life-wmhv-raincloud
#| fig-cap: !expr wmhv_caption
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(wmhv_plots)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dtgmv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of TGMV changes in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of change in TGMV. TGMV = Total Grey Matter Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
load("/data/pt_life/ResearchProjects/LLammer/intergeneration/segmentation_harmonization/Results/ba_plots.RData")
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dTGMV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dtcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of TCV changes in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of change in TCV. TCV = Total Cortical Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dTCV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dlvv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of LVV changes in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of change in LVV. LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dLVV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dhcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of HCV changes in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of change in HCV. HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dHCV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-dav
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of AV changes in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of change in AV. AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("dAV")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-tgmv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline TGMV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline TGMV. TGMV = Total Grey Matter Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TGMV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-tcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline TCV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline TCV. TCV = Total Cortical Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TCV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-lvv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline LVV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline LVV. LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("LVV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-hcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline HCV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline HCV. HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("HCV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-bl-av
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of baseline AV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of baseline AV. AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("AV", "_bl")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-tgmv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up TGMV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of follow-up TGMV. TGMV = Total Grey Matter Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TGMV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-tcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up TCV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of follow-up TCV. TCV = Total Cortical Volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("TCV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-lvv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up LVV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of follow-up LVV. LVV = bilateral lateral ventricle volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("LVV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-hcv
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up HCV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of follow-up HCV. HCV = bilateral hippocampal volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("HCV", "_fu")]])
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=12}
#| label: fig-ba-fu-av
#| fig-cap: "Bland-Altman plots of follow-up AV in longitudinal data. Blue vertical lines indicate the size of one standard deviation of follow-up AV. AV = bilateral amygdala volume"
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| error: false
#| out-width: "100%"
#| out-height: "90%"
#| dpi: 900
print(ba_plots$tp_wrapped_life_ba_plots[[paste0("AV", "_fu")]])
```
